---
title: "Protocol Title"
author: "Faraone Lab"
date: last-modified
---

::: callout-important
## Safety Requirements

-   List PPE (Gloves, Eye protection, etc.)
-   Hazard warnings (e.g., "Work in Fume Hood")
:::

## Purpose

Short description of what this protocol achieves.

## Materials & Equipment

-   Item 1
-   Item 2
-   [ ] Reagent A (check as you prep)

## Procedure

### Step 1: Preparation

1.  Details here.
2.  Details here.

### Step 2: Execution

1.  Details here.

## References

-   Link to paper or manual.

<button onclick="window.print()" class="print-button" title="Print Protocol">

<i class="bi bi-printer"></i>

</button>
